children.text: I will never forget my English teacher, Ms. Griffin.
children.cn: 我永远不会忘记我的英语老师格里芬女士。

children.text: When I first met her in Grade 7, I was very shy.
children.cn: 当我在七年级第一次见到她时，我非常害羞。

children.text: I was afraid of speaking English in class.
children.cn: 我害怕在课堂上说英语。

children.text: However, Ms. Griffin was always patient and friendly.
children.cn: 然而，格里芬老师总是很有耐心且非常友好。

children.text: She often smiled at me and said, "You can do it!"
children.cn: 她经常对我微笑并说：“你能行！”

children.text: Because of her encouragement, I started to put in more effort.
children.cn: 因为她的鼓励，我开始付出更多努力。
我的考试成绩翻了一番。

children.text: I am very thankful to Ms. Griffin.
children.cn: 我非常感激格里芬老师。

children.text: She changed my life by making me more confident.
children.cn: 她通过让我变得更加自信改变了我的人生。
